title: First Steps Baby Blanket 75X100CM Grey Zebra Design
description: First Step S baby blanket, 75 x 100 cm, zebra pattern, grey An essential item for any baby collection, made from soft flannel with an embossed zigzag pattern and embroidered zebra design, ideal for keeping baby snuggly and warm. Material: soft flannel; machine washable at 30 °C
